channel.title: SciComm Job Board | Alliance SciComm & Consulting

item.title: July 2020
item.description:
July 8:

Science Writer

  1. Medical Writer II - Frederick, MD

  2. Manager, Medical Writer ASR - Jersey City, NJ

  3. Clinical Content Specialist I - Boise, ID

  4. Medical Writer II - Frederick, MD

  5. Technical Writer - Portland, OR

  6. Clinical Tech Writer - Manchester, PA

  7. Grant Writer/Consultant - Charlottesville, VA

  8. Technical Writer-Editor - Yakima, WA

  9. Medical Writer - Marlborough, MA

  10. Food Scientist Contractor 2 - Plano, TX

  11. Scientific Writer - Memphis, TN

  12. Specification Writer - Plano, TX

  13. Researcher / Grant Writer - Flagstaff, AZ

  14. Technical Writer – Baton Rouge, Louisiana

  15. RESEARCH SCIENTIST 1/Writer - Seattle, WA

  16. Manager, Medical Writing - Foster City, CA

  17. Associate Director, Medical Writing - Foster City, CA

    Science/Journal Editor

  37. Clinical Editor - Wilmington, DE

  39. Technical Writer-Editor (COVID-19) - Montgomery County, MD

  3. Medical Editor - Gladstone, NJ

  4. NOA2018 Various Consultant, Analyst, Engineer, and Writer Positions - Silver Spring, MD

  7. Principal Regulatory Writer - Gaithersburg, MD 20878

  8. Regulatory Submission Coordinator- Promotional MedEd / MedCom - REMOTE

  10. Freelance Medical Writer - New York, NY

  11. Epic Report Writer - Charlotte, NC 28210

  12. Technical Manager & Writer, Gene Therapy - Malvern, PA 19355

item.title: Jobs in Science Writing and Editing. June, 2020
item.description:
June 24, 2020

  1. Cool #scicomm #scijourno job @esa in Human Spaceflight and Robotic Exploration (based in Noordwijk) https://t.co/R5ZUsOchmC

    — Laurie Winkless (@laurie_winkless) June 23, 2020

  2. .@CWC_AshokaUniv is hiring for the academic year 2020-21.

    Position open: Senior Writing Fellow, Senior Writing Fellow (English Language Teaching), Senior Writing Tutors/Writing Tutors

    Deadline: 12 July 2020
    Submission link: https://t.co/q5pPuVSJhv pic.twitter.com/X09TZJyrYp

    — Ashoka University (@AshokaUniv) June 19, 2020

  3. WANTED: Pitches from BIPOC freelance #ScienceWriters#SciCommJobs #BlackInSTEM #InclusiveSciComm @ScienceWriters @WritersofColor @MetcalfURI @NABJ 🧐

    Discover pays $0.50/word for web, $1-2/word for print. Tips: https://t.co/qMoKLTXxh5

    Drop your favorite science writers here ⬇️

    — Anna Funk (@DrAnnaFunk) June 20, 2020

  4. [REMINDER] We are looking for an experienced Communication Officer to help us develop and implement EMSO ERIC’s communication strategy.

    The deadline for application is 7th July.

    All info @ https://t.co/JA1w5n1u7u#vacancy #HIRINGNOW pic.twitter.com/YUTd2rE1ma

    — EMSO ERIC (@EMSOeu) June 11, 2020

  5. Web designers: We have an exciting role open on the AAAS visual design team. Apply now! https://t.co/r7abOtsqGw pic.twitter.com/SvZ3KlsQe4

    — AAAS (@aaas) June 17, 2020

  6. Job Alert!
    Anyone with ties to the Central Valley in California who has a desire to work at an #LGBT civil rights organization to decrease Tobacco-related health disparities should apply.#SciComm #SciPol #CivilRightshttps://t.co/GMm4h3b8X5

    — Shannon Kozlovich (@KozlovichS) June 17, 2020

  7. * #Scicomm #Job #Alert *

    Two new #journalistic positions available:

    "Contributing Editor - Hindi" & "Content Coordinator - Hindi" at @MongabayIndia

    Rolling applications; Remote location-based#vernacular #environment #hindi https://t.co/V9vqfdCmrahttps://t.co/m3hGOuEO4A https://t.co/QGvqnE6sWc

    — Siddharth #StayHome Kankaria (@SiddhrthKnkaria) June 17, 2020

  8. * #SciAdmin #Job #Alert *

    Another #ScienceAdministration / #ResearchManagement position is available in #Bengaluru.

    Description: A multifaceted coordination role; full-time; 1-year duration; MSc or higher qualification; fixed salary range

    Please DM me asap for further details!

    — Siddharth #StayHome Kankaria (@SiddhrthKnkaria) June 17, 2020
  9. Engineering Specification Writer - Muscatine, IA
  10. Technical Writer - Princeton, NJ
  11. Sr Technical Writer - Baltimore, MD
  12. Documentation/ Technical Writer - Ogden, UT
  13. Senior Medical Writer -Remote
  14. Regulatory Medical Writer - Research Triangle Park, NC
  15. Technical Writer/Scientific - II - West Point, PA
  16. Grant Writer - Boca Raton, FL
  17. Technical Writer- Biopharma/Biomedical - West Point, PA
  18. Manager, Medical Writer ASR - Jersey City, NJ
  19. Associate Director, Publications Planning & Scientific/Medical Publications 1. Writer - Newton, MA
  20. Technical Writer - North Chesterfield, VA
  21. Senior Science Writer - Boston, MA
  22. Bioanalytical Report Writer - Indianapolis, IN
  23. Scientific Writer * Gene Therapy Regulatory Affairs - 1. Vienna, VA
  24. Proposal Writer - Raleigh, NC
  25. Technical Writer/Editor - Arlington, VA
  26. Entry Medical Writer - Remote
  27. Senior Medical Science Liaison - Chicago, IL
  28. Research-Savvy Writer - Remote
  29. Medical Writer (1099) - Silver Spring, MD
  30. Ophthalmic Writer - Plattsburgh, NY
  31. Technical Writer II (Manufacturing/Quality) - Bridgewater, NJ
  32. Senior Medical Writer - Contract - Norwood, MA
  33. Biomedical Science/Health Writer - Silver Spring, MD
  34. Medical Writer I - Medical Communications - Remote
  35. Associate Editor-in-Chief - College Park, MD
  36. Scientific Editor, JCB - New York, NY
  37. Editor/Publisher - Sudbury, MA

June 17, 2020

  1. JOB: Help make a significant contribution towards a sustainable-use economy in Colombia. We're looking for a Science Communications Specialist to join our Useful Plants and Fungi of Colombia project. More details and to apply 👉https://t.co/lyCjlJD8cx pic.twitter.com/vQiX58IrwK

    — Kew Science (@KewScience) June 15, 2020

  2. BFI is currently hiring for a Communications Director (job code 8179) to grow our communications and outreach of sustainable, equitable, and just food systems at UC Berkeley and beyond. Apply by June 30: https://t.co/vvIuziOFWF pic.twitter.com/gVppMvwcei

    — Berkeley Food Inst. (@UCBerkeleyFood) June 8, 2020

  3. WE'RE HIRING: #FoodAgility are seeking a Content & Communications Officer for a full-time 12 month contract. Are you a skilled content developer who can help us tell stories of data and digital tech in the agrifood sector? APPLY NOW: https://t.co/BwPDUMzrH6

    — Food Agility CRC (@foodagility) June 16, 2020

  4. Any #scicomms out there looking for a new opportunity? Our team is looking for its next Communications and Media Officer. We're a small team dedicated to communicating waterway health in the Mackay-Whitsunday-Isaac Region #GBR #waterwayhealth #Hiring link below 👇

    — M-O-O-N and that spells... 🌚 (@Charlie_mahi) June 15, 2020

  5. #Job opportunity ‼️ @Ecsite is looking for a Project Manager to work on some of their EU funded projects

    📍ideal candidates should have some knowledge & experience in the #scicomm #PublicEngagement #scienceeducation #RRI fields

    🗓️Apply by 18 June 👉 https://t.co/yc7thhhFez pic.twitter.com/rTqQJX7z2w

    — RRI Tools (@RRITools) June 3, 2020

  6. We are hiring!

    Communications Manager for @IPCC_CH Working Group I

    We are looking for an experienced climate science communications specialist for the international launch of the #AR6 WGI report to the media and public.https://t.co/IJVevFLzY2
    Apply by July 15th 2020 pic.twitter.com/j2FCpXdJoi

    — Anna Pirani (@anna_pirani) June 16, 2020

  7. JOB: Communications Director @NWF #wildlife #scicomm #conservation #STEM https://t.co/kr93PEPXxf

    — Sylvia Fallon (@SylviaFallon) June 16, 2020

  8. 📢JOB ALERT📢 @ASMicrobiology is looking for a p/t Scientific Literature Reviewer (specifically on #COVID19). Position can be remote! If you enjoy(ed) journal clubs while in grad school, this could be a dream job! 🤓 #SciComm Consider applying today: https://t.co/PshgwKlg1q

    — Amy Kullas, Ph.D. (@Amy_Kullas) June 16, 2020

  9. Job alert: @BirdNoteRadio is looking for a production manager! No need to be a bird expert. Looking for an organized and team-oriented person to support both podcast and broadcast arms of this creative, well-funded team! #BirdTwitter #scicomm https://t.co/wfwUNtmRs6

    — Ashley Ahearn (@aahearn) June 15, 2020

  10. Now hiring: #IPCC Working Group I Technical Support Unit are looking for a Communications Manager to based in Paris, France.

    ➡️ Read more: https://t.co/fOHforDCS6#AR6 #ClimateChange #GlobalGoals pic.twitter.com/MxfmB9XlRy

    — IPCC (@IPCC_CH) June 12, 2020

  11. #Job opportunity!
    Science Writer @APSphysics to "produce articles that convey the excitement of physics and the essential role the physical sciences play in the modern world"
    Open to remote candidates!

    See all the details here👉https://t.co/N468qw8iyM#MSUPostdocs #scicomm

    — MSU-PDA (@MSUPDA) June 16, 2020

  12. Announcement time: I left @NatureBiotech after 8 years and am now full-time chief editor @NatureMicrobiol. Come work with me! https://t.co/YV0rPlcYkQ

    — Susan E. Jones (@SooJones) June 13, 2020

  13. Antarctic Heritage Trust is looking for a talented Communications Advisor to join our small but high performing team. This role is critical to helping us share the world’s greatest polar exploration stories.

    Find out more and apply online at: https://t.co/tXt7nTLndS pic.twitter.com/BKYCIS00Wg

    — Antarctic Heritage (@InspireExplore) June 12, 2020

  14. This week's roundup has a little bit of everything: STEM jobs at every level, mentorship roles, #scicomm opportunities, funding advice, and pro bono services.

    Happy Friday, everyone!⚡️ https://t.co/oxYhDM32WU

    — Sister (@sisterSTEM) June 12, 2020

  15. Speak Spanish? Want to work at NASA? This is a GREAT company and a GREAT job opening in #scicomm! https://t.co/V6ZeU0JS6P

    — Aries (@Aries) June 12, 2020

  16. 🚨#ScicommJob@Ecsite is hiring a project manager, all the details here 👇https://t.co/pSSoWTYwFz pic.twitter.com/B88uv1PUT0

    — Elodie Chabrol (@EloScicomm) June 12, 2020

  17. SAi Fellows Program is looking for a part time assistant program manager. #scicomm #scicommjobs #scicommjob #sciencematters https://t.co/aUcETVuxXG

    — Scicomm Board (@scicommboard) June 11, 2020

  18. Looking for your next best thing? We're hiring a Media Relations Advisor #jobs #scicomm https://t.co/nWFkDh98OP pic.twitter.com/oXyWyYN7nu

    — Nick Hennen (@tweetbrk) June 10, 2020

  19. Looking for a new opportunity on #MedComms day? We're hiring! Learn about our openings (and all the fun we have at work) here: https://t.co/asIHDEEkLL #medcommsday #scicomm #jobs pic.twitter.com/IO6KEYCGXs

    — MedThink SciCom (@MedThinkSciCom) June 10, 2020

  20. Dear Canada:
    disaster scicomm x tech #job https://t.co/LxZlYYU5aL

    — Mika McKinnon (@mikamckinnon) June 9, 2020

  21. #CBR_UBC is hiring! We’re looking for a part-time Communications Coordinator.

    Apply by June 25 here: https://t.co/6ognIl2zvX #WeAreHiring #SciComm #Careers #ScienceJobs pic.twitter.com/Dc9sLHrJdi

    — UBC Centre for Blood Research (@CBR_UBC) June 15, 2020

  22. We're hiring! #scicomm

    Looking for a PhD-level scientist with excellent written/verbal communication skills

    Position entails guiding the development of media such as press releases, web pages, blogs, infographics, and videos. #scicommjobshttps://t.co/MF8HJHuIr2

    — Jenna E Gallegos (@FoodBeerScience) June 10, 2020

  23. Gig Alert (or #Giga-lert) we're hiring a #scicomm (or similar) writer. like: Writer. help @UNICEFinnovate talk abt open-source projects trying to make humanity more fair, equal, and just. (+'s: global experience, humo/ur, position for/against oxford ,'s) https://t.co/wsQ1mgc1ec

    — chris fabian (@hichrisfabian) June 9, 2020

  24. Data Analyst/Report Writer - Richmond, VA 23228

  25. Technical Writer/Editor - Columbia, MD

  26. Technical Writer - Portland, OR

  27. Technical Writer, Associate Principal TS/SCI - Springfield, VA

  28. Medical Writer - Lexington, MA

  29. Scientific Writer - Philadelphia, PA

  30. Technical Proposal Writer - Arlington, VA

  31. Technical Document Writer - Chesapeake, VA

  32. Senior Managing Editor - STEM - Atlanta, GA/Remote

  33. Information Science Specialist - Oak Ridge, TN

  34. Scientific Writer I - Monrovia, CA

  35. Medical, Scientific Writer - Boulder, CO

  36. Medical Writer / Senior Medical Writer - Remote

  37. Medical Writer I/II - Raleigh, NC

  38. Senior Medical Writer (Contract) - Cambridge, MA

  39. Principal Medical Writer - Boston, MA

  40. Science Writer Specialist - Oklahoma City, OK

  41. Medical Writer - Bethesda, MD

  42. Grant Writer/Consultant - Remote

  43. Technical Writer - Somerville, MA

  44. Associate Medical Writer - Fairfield, CT, Philadelphia-PA, and Warren

  45. Medical Writer - Boston, MA

  46. Scientific Training and Documentation Writer - Seattle, WA

  47. Data Science Content Writer - Remote

  48. Principal Medical Writer - Newton, MA

  49. Volunteer Grant Writer - Remote

  50. Technical Writer - Vancouver, WA

  51. Contract Multimedia Editor - Remote

  52. Medical Editor - Minneapolis, MN

  53. Editor - New York, NY

  54. Copy Editor - Cranbury, NJ

  55. Copywriter / Copy Editor - Remote

  56. Assistant Journal Manager - Melville, NY

  57. Academic Editor - Remote

  58. News Editor - Washington, DC

  59. Managing Editor - Washington, DC

  60. REALM Project Toolkit Editor, Museums - Contract

  61. REALM Project Toolkit Editor, Libraries and Archives - Contract

  62. Developmental Editor in Climate - Remote

  63. Developmental Editor in Clinical Sciences - Remote

  64. Developmental Editor in Bioinformatics - Remote

  65. Developmental Editor in Optics/Physics - Remote

  66. Analytics Editor, Life Sciences - Medford, MA or Hoboken, NJ

  67. Associate Editor - Philadelphia, PA

  68. Assistant Journal Manager - Melville, NY

  69. Academic Editor - Remote

  70. Contract Health Editor/Writer - Contract

  71. Senior Manager Publishing - Rockville, MD

  72. Associate Medical Editor - Cranbury, NJ

  73. Academic Editor in Neuroscience - Remote

  74. Technical Communications Specialist 3 (Managing Editor) - University Park, PA

  75. Copy/Technical Editor - Frederick, MD

  76. Associate or Senior Editor, Nature Cancer - New York or London

  77. Medical Editor - Chicago, IL

  78. Associate or Senior Editor, Science Translational Medicine - Washington, DC or Cambridge, UK

  79. Editor In Chief - New York, NY

  80. Academic Editor in Business - Remote

item.title: Jobs in Science Writing. May, 2020
item.description:
A curated list of early-career science journalism jobs.

An advice thread:

🧵 with unsolicited job advice for new PhDs and almost-done postdocs:

If you enjoy scientific writing, consider looking into freelance scientific editing/writing. The Council of Science Editors (CSE) is a great place to start. Their job board is hopping right now. (+)

— Kate Kadash-Edmondson (@KadashKate) April 24, 2020

Another jobs account:

Thinking of a career outside of academia? Follow our companion account, @aslo_opps! We share jobs and opportunities in #SciencePolicy, #SciComm, & more. Whether you’re actively looking for a job, or want to get a sense of what’s out there, @aslo_opps is a great resource. pic.twitter.com/hI2eJS6xf7

— ASLO (@aslo_org) May 21, 2020

May 27, 2020

  1. JOB OPPORTUNITY at the #scholcommlab (short term|remote)! Looking for someone to do some research communications (infographics, social media) for the month of June.

    Details: https://t.co/4vpBICRh8g

    Spread the word! #scicomm #scholcomm

    — Juan Pablo Alperin (@juancommander) May 15, 2020

  2. Hello #scicomm folks! the Climate Impacts Research Consortium (CIRC) has a job opening for a project coordinator via @OregonState https://t.co/4PwpNhjlR8

    — Aspen Global Change (@aspenglobal) May 20, 2020

  3. Ryerson University #writer #job in #scicomm. https://t.co/y7qrEvuGsN

    — Claire Eamer (@CEamer) May 22, 2020

  4. I just added several new jobs to this thread for anyone who might be job-hunting! #SciComm #greenjobs #conservation https://t.co/Y9YqP7Ic8s

    — Sarah Nason (@nasonicus) May 22, 2020

  5. #scicomm peeps: we are hiring a Science Communications Specialist at @BigelowLab in #Maine! Apply by June 15. Please help spread the word! https://t.co/GEnVDMA9Gj

    — Beth Orcutt (@DeepMicrobe) May 22, 2020

  6. Interested in communicating about enviro and sustainability issues? Apply to join our team https://t.co/ZeOl9TflHZ

    — Sophie Lewis (@drsophielewis) May 22, 2020

  7. We are looking for a Digital Communications Officer who has a passion for science and engaging with the public to join The Physiological Society’s communications team! Find out more about the role here: https://t.co/BZJpvX7Gfq
    Closing date: 5 June#NowHiring #scicomm #jobs pic.twitter.com/y7lisSiM4a

    — PhysiologicalSociety (@ThePhySoc) May 25, 2020

  8. #scicomm job opportunity, deadline May 31st. Details below. Looks great for a SCONC looking for remote work. https://t.co/gSDb0Kdx1C

    — Science Communicators of North Carolina (@sconc) May 25, 2020

  9. INTERNSHIP Water Quality (In-stream Flow & River Watch Programs): Denver, CO; $15.25 an hour

  10. Intern- Science Writer: New York, NY

  11. Creative Marketing Writer (Chinese Fluency): Boston, MA

  12. Technical Proposal Writer (Consultant): Rockville, MD

  13. Medical Writer: Yardley, PA

  14. Sr. Technical Writer/Editor/ Communication Specialist: Washington, DC 20005; $80,000 - 100,000 a year

  15. Scientific Advisor:Cambridge, MA

  16. Medical Writer

  17. Nonclinical Regulatory Writer: San Diego, CA

  18. Bioanalytical Report Writer:Remote

  19. Technical Writer

  20. Senior Clinical Scientist - Oncology: Remote

  21. Medical Writer II

  22. Grant Writer:Woburn, MA; $40 - 50 an hour

  23. Grant Writer / Researcher: Provo, UT; Full-time, Part-time

  24. Lead Proposal Writer, Federal Government Contracts: Columbus, OH

  25. SEO Content Writer: Fresno, CA

  26. Strategic Content Specialist / Writer: Silver Spring, MD

  27. Promotional Review Editor: Trenton, NJ

  28. Writer/Editor National Marine Sanctuary Foundation: Silver Spring, MD; $54,000 - 59,000 a year

  29. Proposal Manager: Morrisville, NC

  30. Scientific Writer - Manuscript: Gaithersburg, MD

  31. Scientific Writer And Website Developer: Remote; $20 - 50 an hour

  32. Executive Assistant: Marion, MA; Remote; Part-time

  33. Managing Scientific Editor :Washington, DC

  34. Graduate Program Coordinator: Seattle, WA; Part-time

  35. Senior Editor: Gaithersburg, MD

  36. Assistant Editor: New York, NY

  37. Grant Officer, Salt Lake Community College: Salt Lake City, UT; Full-time, Part-time

  38. Production Editor: Bloomington, MN

  39. Technical Writer (Contract): Washington, DC

  40. Senior Manager Publishing: Rockville, MD; $55,000 - 63,000 a year

May 20, 2020

  1. Job Opportunity!

    NASA - National Aeronautics and Space Administration seeks a Public Affairs Specialist based in Washington D.C. @NASA https://t.co/6cTWvOrOhu

    — Daybook (@DaybookJobs) May 12, 2020

  2. Hey everyone! I'm looking for a postdoctoral research associate to come work with me and @KQEDscience on our @NSF funded projects! Please forward to those who may be interested!! #scicomm https://t.co/SO9ctVYBX7

    — Asheley R. Landrum (@LandrumAR) May 13, 2020

  3. .@RockefellerFdn is hiring a Power and Climate Communications Associate for its Communications, Policy & Advocacy team, developing clear, compelling messages and content to be used across a variety of platforms. #SciPolJobs #scicommjob #scicomm https://t.co/BsTTNdwFkg

    — Science Policy Jobs (@SciPolJobs) May 15, 2020

  4. Opportunities in Canada:

    Hey #SciComm community! I noticed a bunch of new job postings in Western Canada recently and wanted to share in case anyone else is looking! (thread) #SciArt #ECR #greenjobs I'll add to this thread if I find more!

    — Sarah Nason (@nasonicus) May 16, 2020

  5. Hey @NASW and @NSWA members: We’ve got a job @PNNLab, for someone skilled at both science writing and media relations. Great benefits, low taxes, and a huge science program to explore. Join us! https://t.co/VhAYX14WyW

    — Tom Rickey (@trickeyPNNL) May 15, 2020

  6. Policy and research manager: London, UK

  7. Copywriter: New York
